title: Senior Financial Analyst - Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Kochi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
